titleStmt.title: SII 29.147: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 147. (A.R. No. B. 627 of 1961-62.) KERAVASE, KARKALA TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab [1] setup in the mūḍa-basti of Vardhamāna Svāmi.

It records a political agreement entered into by Pāñḍya-dēvarasa of Keravase and Kāmirāyarasa Banga of Bangavāḍi. Both the rulers agreed to suspend thence forward all acts of hostility against each other, that when one was to be attacked by an outsider, the other will rush to the help of the defender and none of the two shall unilaterally enter into any pact with the Chauṭas.

It is dated Śaka 1083, Vishu, Āśvīja, Śu. 1, Thursday. It corresponds with 1161 A.D., September 21. But the Śaka year given is too early and wrong for the record is in the characters of the 15th century A.D. If it is taken to mean a mistake for Śaka 1383 then the given tithi corresponds to 1461 A.D., September 5, Saturday [not Sunday]. This date falls with in the reign period of both the kings mentioned in the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasvādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ jīyāttrailōkyanāthasyaśāsanaṁ ji
naśāsanaṁ . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1083 neya viṣu saṁvatsarada Āśvayija śu 1 guruvārada
lu śrīmatu pāṁḍyadēvarasarige kāmirāyarasarāda baṁgaru barasi koṭṭa śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare nā
Ū nīu kaṁḍu mātanāḍi baṁgavāḍi keravase Uḷalli paryyaṁtara Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi yeraḍu śā
sanada vakhaṇebhiṁnavāgadahāṁge yeraḍu kōlabaḷi sāviradavaru . cikarasaru hariAdhikāri dēvarsaru . gōpaṇa sēna bōvaru kūḍi
koṁḍu jinēśvarana muṁdiṭṭu . naṁma niṁma keḍuvanu kōlabaḷi sāviradavaru keḍvanu dāṁṭisalu kaṭṭu pramā
ṇava māḍi koṁḍevāgi baṁgavāḍi keravasege Arasanu pariyiṁdavoḷage baṁdu hoṟagaṁnya riṁda tetare
yi taṁḍau kūḍi AnubhavisuveU niṁma kūḍārobbaru kādidare Avarigu navagū gaḍi Uṁṭādare mukha
dalli kāduveU gaḍilladidare naṁma sāviradavaranu kaḷihi lōsu hollehavanu kūḍi Anubhavisuvevu nammakū
ḍe Āru kādidaru niU Avara kūḍe gaḍi Uṁṭādare kāduviri gaḍiyilladdare kōlabaḷiyavara kaḷihikū
ḍanu Anubhavisuviri navagunivagu naṁdaḷike koṟamaḍiyalu cavuṭaralli tettaṁthā kelalake naṁdaḷike koṟama
ḍiyalliya taṁḍau Āḷanirisi sādhyava māḍi koṁbaṁnabara Obbarannobbaru biṭṭu cauṭara
kūḍi saṁtaisikoḷasalladu navagunivagu ghaṭṭada mēle keḷage manuṣya dōṣadiṁda vaimanasu baṁdare sāvirada
varu kōlabaḷiyavaru budhivaṁtaru kūḍi saṁtaisi koḷuhudallade kāḷagavanu māḍikoḷasalladu nīvu baṁga
vāḍiyiṁda maṁgalūra tanaka Āvallige baṁdaru nāvu keravasege baṁdaru manuṣya baṁdare māta
nāḍithaṁdedaṁtheve māḍikoṁbevu hoṟagāvalliUyēnu kelasa tettaru nāunīu kūḍi lēsu
hollehava AnubhavisuveU Āṁmara baḷavanu nāunīu kūḍi sādhyava māḍikoṁḍu yibbaru ha
cikoṁḍu bāḷuveU yi śāsanadalli barada vakhaṇegaḷelladakku tapade naḍaveU tappidare lōkadoḷa
guḷa cayityālayagaḷa jina pratumegaḷanu yellā dēvasthānagaḷa dēvaranu biṁnava māḍida dōṣakke
hōharu yella gō brāhmaranu vāraṇāsiyalli vadhista dōṣakke hōharu taṁma yippatto
ṁdu talahina pitrugaḷanu kayiyūra vadhista dōṣakke hōhareṁdoṁḍaṁ biṭṭu barasida
śilāśāsana . yi śāsanava barasida nimitta keravaseya vardhamāna dēvarige nayivēdya baṁgavāḍiyalu
pāḍi gāṟa Appu hebbāruvara bāḷinalu naḍava saṁṇa pratāpa 12 nu naḍasi ba
heU . kāmirāyara sarāda baṁgaraOppa . śrīvītarāga yī śāsanavanu kāmirāyarsara taṁma pā
ṁḍyapparasara Anumatadiṁda barasida śāsana maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 29.147 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
